member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Extensions
member.summary: Extensions on Mesh objects.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Extensions.CreateTableName(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a table name using the ObjectNameCreator given to the repository.
member.returns: The name of the table formatted for the appropriate data source.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Extensions.CreateColumnName(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository,System.Object)
member.summary: Creates a column name using the ObjectNameCreator given to the repository.
member.returns: The name of the column formatted for the appropriate data source.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository
member.summary: An interface with the necessary SQL functionality to implement a mesh connector.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.CreateTable(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.CreateTableSpecification)
member.summary: Creates the table using the provided table specification.
member.param: The specification to create the table.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.ExecuteCommand(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.SqlMeshParameter})
member.summary: Executes the provided command.
member.param: The parameters to use in the command.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.ExecuteQuery(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.SqlMeshParameter})
member.summary: Executes the query using the provided parameters and returns a DataTable with the result.
member.param: The query to retrieve the values.
member.returns: A DataTable with the result of the query.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.SqlTypeProvider
member.summary: Provides an ISqlType given the mesh data type.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.SqlTypesProvider
member.summary: Provides all the database system types.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.DomainValueKeyCreator
member.summary: Creates domain object keys given the provided domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.LinkKeyFormProvider
member.summary: Provides the link form specification for linked domains.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.ObjectNameCreator
member.summary: Creates a language-specific name given the SqlObject. e.g. Adds [ and ] to the ends of the name.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository.WhereTransformer
member.summary: Transforms a WhereExpressionNode to conform to an implemented connector.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType
member.summary: The necessary interface for a SQL type.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.MeshDataType
member.summary: The type of the Mesh DataType to which this is related.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.ToCSTransform
member.summary: Transforms the SQL type to a C# type.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.ToSqlTransform
member.summary: Converts a C# typed value to a SQL value.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.SqlTypeNames
member.summary: The name of the SQL types to which the mesh type maps.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.SqlPrimaryKeyTypeNames
member.summary: The name of the SQL types to which the mesh type maps if it is a primary key. (e.g. varchar(128) instead of varchar(max))

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlType.SqlTypeCount
member.summary: The number of SQL types to which the mesh type maps.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic
member.summary: The mechanics for interacting with a SQL repository in a unique way.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.SqlDomainTranslator
member.summary: Sets the SqlDomainTranslator when the domain is being created.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.CreateDomain(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.CreateTableSpecification)
member.summary: Creates the domain using the given table specification.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.PrepareGenerics(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository,HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository,HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain,HularionMesh.Domain.MeshGeneric[])
member.summary: Prepares the domain to handle the provided generics.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.SetupInsert(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlGenerator.SqlMeshInsert,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObject[])
member.summary: Sets up the insert statement.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.SetupUpdate(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlGenerator.SqlMeshUpdate,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObjectUpdater[])
member.summary: Sets up the update statement.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.ISqlRepositoryMechanic.ManifestQueryResult(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObject})
member.summary: Further manifests the result of a query.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.MechanicUpdateOption
member.summary: Options for a mechanic when updating values.

member.name: F:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.MechanicUpdateOption.UpdateNone
member.summary: Update none of the values in the mechanic domain.

member.name: F:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.MechanicUpdateOption.UpdateMeta
member.summary: Updates just the Meta values in the mechanic domain.

member.name: F:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.MechanicUpdateOption.UpdateAll
member.summary: Update all values in the mechanic domain.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic
member.summary: The details for implementing Set in a SQL repository.

member.name: F:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic.Repository
member.summary: The SqlMeshRepository.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic.SqlDomainTranslator
member.summary: Sets the SqlDomainTranslator when the domain is being created.

member.summary: Constructor.

member.summary: Creates the domain using the given table specification.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic.PrepareGenerics(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository,HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository,HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain,HularionMesh.Domain.MeshGeneric[])
member.summary: Prepares the domain to handle the provided generics.

member.summary: Sets up the insert statement.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic.SetupUpdate(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlGenerator.SqlMeshUpdate,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObjectUpdater[])
member.summary: Sets up the update statement.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mechanic.SetSqlMechanic.ManifestQueryResult(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObject})
member.summary: Further manifests the result of a query.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService
member.summary: Implements IDomainService for SQL domains.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.Repository
member.summary: The SqlMeshRepository.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.#ctor(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ISqlRepository)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.CreateDomain(HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain)
member.summary: Creates the given domain.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.UpdateDomain(HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain)
member.summary: Updates the given domain.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.DeleteDomain(HularionMesh.IMeshKey)
member.summary: Deletes the domain with the given key.
member.param: THe key fo the domain to delete.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetDomain(HularionMesh.IMeshKey)
member.summary: Provides the MeshDomain given the domain key.
member.param: The key of the domain to get.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetDomain(System.String)
member.summary: Provides the MeshDomain given the domain's friendly name.
member.param: The friendly name of the domain to get.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetAllValueDomains
member.summary: Provides all the MeshDomains.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetAllLinkDomains
member.summary: Provides all the LinkedDomains.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetDomainValueService(HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain)
member.summary: Provides the IDomainValueService given the MeshDomain.
member.param: The domain affected by the service to get.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetDomainValueService(HularionMesh.IMeshKey)
member.summary: Provides the IDomainValueService given the MeshDomain's key.
member.param: The key of the domain affected by the service to get.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainService.GetDomainLinkService(HularionMesh.DomainLink.LinkedDomains)
member.summary: Provides the IDomainLinkService given the LinkedDomains.
member.param: The link domain between domains affected by the service to get.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore
member.summary: Implements IDomainValueStore by storing data to a SQL database.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.Domain
member.summary: The domain of the objects managed by this store.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.Repository
member.summary: The SqlMeshRepository.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.SqlDomain
member.summary: The mesh domain sql translator.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.#ctor(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository,HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlDomainTranslator)
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.QueryValues(HularionMesh.IMeshKey,HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainReadRequest)
member.summary: Queries the values of this store.
member.param: The key of the user making the request.
The root node of a where expression tree.
The values to read in the query.
member.returns: The objects matching the provided query parameters.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.QueryCount(HularionMesh.IMeshKey,HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode)
member.summary: Queries the number of records matching where.
member.param: The key of the user making the request.
The root node of a where expression tree.
member.returns: The number of records matching where.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.InsertValues(HularionMesh.IMeshKey,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObject[])
member.summary: Inserts the provided values to the store and sets the key on each object.
member.param: The key of the user making the request.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.UpdateValues(HularionMesh.IMeshKey,HularionMesh.DomainValue.DomainObjectUpdater[])
member.summary: Updates the values specified by the updater and then reads the requested values back.
member.param: The key of the user making the request.
Specifies which objects and which object members to update.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Mesh.SqlDomainValueStore.DeleteValues(HularionMesh.IMeshKey,HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode)
member.summary: Deletes the specified objects.
member.param: The key of the user making the request.
The root where node which details how to query the objects to delete.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty
member.summary: Domain property represented in a SQL-compatible form.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.DomainKey
member.summary: The key of the domain for which this value is set.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.Key
member.summary: The key of the property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.Name
member.summary: The name of the property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.Type
member.summary: The type of the property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.MultiTypeOrder
member.summary: The order number of this property if it is a multi-type property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.SqlType
member.summary: The SQL type of the property.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.Default
member.summary: The default Value of the property serialized to a string.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.ValuePropertyProxy
member.summary: Describes whether this value is a proxy for the Domain's Key or a Meta value.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.Generics
member.summary: Contains the generic types serialized to a string.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainProperty.IsGenericParameter
member.summary: True iff the type of this property is set by a generic argument of the domain.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainValue
member.summary: Represents a value attached to a domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainValue.DomainKey
member.summary: The key of the domain for which this value is set.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainValue.Name
member.summary: The name of the value.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlDomainValue.Value
member.summary: The serialized value.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain
member.summary: Maps a mesh domain to a SQL table to get or set the domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Key
member.summary: The domain key.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.TableName
member.summary: The name of the table storing the domain values.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Generics
member.summary: The generic parameters of the domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.IsGeneric
member.summary: true iff the domain has generic parameters.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.UniqueName
member.summary: The unique portion of the domain key.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.IsLinkDomain
member.summary: true iff this domain links two other domains.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.ADomainKey
member.summary: A domain key if this domain is a link domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.BDomainKey
member.summary: A domain key if this domain is a link domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Properties
member.summary: The properties associated with this domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Values
member.summary: The values associated with this domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Repository
member.summary: The SqlMeshRepository.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.Domain
member.summary: The mesh domain that this model represents.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.Model.SqlMeshDomain.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor.

member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The mesh domain associated with this domain.

member.summary: Creates a MeshDomain from this.
member.returns: The cretaed domain.

member.summary: Creates parameters with names unique to the creator instance.

member.summary: The index used to create a parameter.

member.summary: The member that is being mapped.

member.summary: The kind of member being mapped.

member.summary: Constructor.

member.summary: Gets the value of this member within the container object.
member.param: The object that has this property.
member.returns: The value of this member within the container.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.TypeMemberInfo.GetWhereString(System.String[])
member.summary: Gets the SQL where clause for this member.
member.returns: The SQL where clause for this member.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.TypeMemberInfo.PropertyIsAColumn(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Determines whether the specified property is mapped to a column.
member.returns: true iff the specified property is mapped to a column.

member.summary: Determines whether the specified field is mapped to a column.

member.summary: The kind of member being mapped.

member.summary: The name of the columns storing the property values.

member.summary: The name of the columns with the prefixes. Must match a DataTable column.

member.summary: Keywords used in SqlBase

member.summary: The reserved name of a table column for databases that require a column when creating a table.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository
member.summary: A repository used to map objects in Mesh-to-SQL.

member.name: F:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.SqlRepository
member.summary: The mesh connector.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.MechanicProvider
member.summary: Provides the mechanic for the given domain key or null if there is no mechanic.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.DomainTableNameProvider
member.summary: Provides the table name for the given domain.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.SqlDomainProvider
member.summary: Provides a SQL domain given a mesh domain.

member.summary: Constructor.

member.summary: Executes the provided command.
member.param: The parameters to use in the command.

member.summary: Creates objects of the specified type and maps the query result to them.
member.typeparam: The type of object to create.
member.param: The query to retrieve the values.
member.returns: The objects created from the query result.

member.param: The type of object to create.
The query to retrieve the values.
member.returns: The objects created from the query result.

member.summary: Saves the provided values.
member.returns: The mapping of the value to the related save result.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.RegisterTypes(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object})
member.summary: Registers the types of the values and returns objects having types with a corresponding table.
member.param: The values with types to check.
member.returns: Objects having types with a corresponding table.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.QueryTable(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.ORM.TypeTableInfo,System.Object)
member.summary: Queries for the table matching the provided value.
member.param: Information related to the type and tbale.
The value for which to query.
member.returns: The data table with the matching record.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetModelInfo(System.Type)
member.summary: Gets the model table info given its type.
member.returns: The model table.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.CreateDomainOnce(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlDomainTranslator)
member.summary: Creates the domain. Use this for domains that are non-dynamic (e.g. non-C# type associated).

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.CreateOrUpdateDomain(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlDomainTranslator)
member.summary: Creates a table for the specified domain or updates the table by adding columns.
member.remarks: 1. Deprecated columns are not handled. 2. Columns setting a different type are not changed.
member.param: The mesh domain to create or update.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.DeleteDomain(HularionMesh.IMeshKey)
member.summary: Deletes the domain with the provided key.
member.param: The key of the domain to delete.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetDomain(HularionMesh.IMeshKey)
member.summary: Gets the domain with the provided key.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetDomains(HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode)
member.summary: Gets the domain matching the where clause.
member.param: The where clause used to find the domain(s).
member.returns: The matching domains.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.SaveDomains(HularionMesh.Domain.MeshDomain[])
member.summary: Saves the provided domains.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetAllValueDomains
member.summary: Provides all the value domains.
member.returns: All the value domains.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetAllLinkedDomains
member.summary: Provides all the link domains.
member.returns: The link domains.

member.summary: Executes the query and maps the result to domain objects with the specified domain.
member.param: The domain of the objects to map.
The query to retrieve the object information.
member.returns: The query result mapped to domain objects with the specified domain.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlMeshRepository.GetDomainWhereCount(HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlDomainTranslator,HularionMesh.WhereExpressionNode)
member.summary: Returns the number of records in the provided domain.
member.param: The domain for which the records will be counted.
Determines which records will be counted.
member.returns: The number of matching records in the domain.

member.summary: Makes a domain key for the specified generics.
member.returns: The domain key with the generics.

member.summary: Implements IMeshServiceProvider for SqlBase.

member.summary: The type of sql object.

member.summary: Contains information to map a type to table columns.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlProperty.SqlType
member.summary: The type being mapped.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlProperty.TableName
member.summary: The name of the table in which the columns exist.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlProperty.ColumnNames
member.summary: The ordered names of the columns to which the property maps.

member.summary: The categories of mesh properites.

member.summary: The domain member properties.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.SqlRepositoryInjector
member.summary: Implements an injector for an ISqlRepository to replace IMeshKey with string.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereNodeInformation
member.summary: Contains information for about a where node that will be used to transform it by the connector as necessary.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereNodeInformation.Where
member.summary: The where node being transformed.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereNodeInformation.PrimaryProperty
member.summary: The property information related to the Property string in the where node.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformRequest
member.summary: The details for configuring a WhereExpressionNode.
member.remarks: The details needed to adjust the Where node and apply it to multiple columns.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformRequest.Root
member.summary: A where node with column comparison.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformRequest.WhereInformationProvider
member.summary: Provides property information for the corresponding where node.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformRequest.GetWhereEvaluationPlan(HularionCore.Pattern.Topology.TreeTraversalOrder)
member.summary: Traverses the where node tree and returns an array of WhereExpressionNode according to the specified order.
member.param: The order in which to traverse the tree,
member.returns: An array of WhereExpressionNode according to the specified order.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformResult
member.summary: The result of a where adjustment.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Translator.SqlBase.WhereTransformResult.Root
member.summary: The root of the result WhereExpressionNode.
